privileged_info_summary: Benzene (CAS 71-43-2) is a real chemical compound with verified safety data. The NFPA 704 ratings are Health=2 (temporary incapacitation or residual injury possible), Flammability=3 (ignitable under almost all ambient conditions), and Instability=0 (normally stable). The DOT transportation classification is UN1114, Class 3 (Flammable Liquid), Packing Group II, which is consistent with benzene's low flash point of 12°F. All chemical safety metadata claims are accurate according to the NOAA CAMEO Chemicals database and U.S. transportation regulations (49 CFR §172).
